description_long: This is a brightly colored water gun featuring a large, cylindrical green water reservoir mounted on top of a red plastic body. The main body has a pistol-like shape with a prominent handle and a trigger mechanism, both in red. The front of the gun extends into a gray barrel with a ribbed section near the base, suggesting a grip for pumping or priming. The water reservoir is secured with a red band and appears detachable for easy refilling. The overall design is playful and ergonomic, with smooth, rounded edges and a color scheme that enhances its toy-like appearance.
description: A colorful water gun with a green cylindrical reservoir on a red pistol-shaped body and a gray barrel, designed for playful use.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the circular end of the green reservoir and the red handle, with the trigger and grip details partially visible.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the full length of the water gun, showing the green reservoir, red body, gray barrel, and the trigger and grip.
description_view_2: The front view displays the round end of the reservoir and the gray nozzle, with minimal detail of the handle or trigger.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the reservoir, body, barrel, and handle, but from the opposite side.
attribute_trigger_design: The trigger is a standard pull type, medium-sized, and positioned within the red handle area. It appears smooth with no visible texturing or color contrast.
attribute_nozzle_type: The nozzle is a single, cylindrical gray tip at the front, with no visible adjustable or decorative features.
attribute_water_reservoir_style: The water reservoir is a large, green, cylindrical tank mounted horizontally on top of the gun, secured with a red band. It appears detachable and has a smooth surface with no visible fill cap.
attribute_grip_pattern: The grip area is red with a smooth surface and a slight ergonomic curve, lacking any visible ridges, grooves, or rubberized sections.
